title: DOUJIN Found something interesting D
wikitext:
[]: [DOUJIN] Found something... interesting. =D             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 10, 2009 1:16 am I must know what is going on here and if there is more of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Feb 10, 2009 1:26 am Ooooh, I wanna know too.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Feb 10, 2009 5:58 am That is interesting! We need someone to translate.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Feb 10, 2009 7:21 am That's fairly old, I've known of it since about the time I really started frequenting the forums here. Its from a doujin, which unfortunately I lost in a hard drive crash about a year and a half ago. Source is out there somewhere, but to the best of my knowlege, it was never translated.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Feb 10, 2009 3:42 pm Just post the picture and ask where it's from on THAT BOARD. Since it's been scanned, someone there is bound to know where it's from.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 10, 2009 3:54 pm I would, but THAT BOARD appears to be having troubles again.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 10, 2009 4:09 pm It's from one of the volumes of Sono go no Evangelion by Pengel. Basically Asuka-Shinji post-3I love-love stuff with extras scattered throughout. I can put it up once I get home.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 10, 2009 5:44 pm It's Sonogo no Evangelion by Pengel (link is to his Eva page) . The context (IIRC, could be wrong) is Kaji, Misato, and Ritsuko dressing up as the Children to see if they can pilot the Eva. Either way, it is just a silly short extra amongst mostly Asuka/Shinji post-3I WAFFles. And although the whole sonogo series isn't translated yet, it will be...eventually... >_>

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 10, 2009 5:47 pm Nifty! The 'Gendo in a plugsuit' bit was just too hilarious to not investigate.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Wed Feb 11, 2009 3:24 am They also have some soft Yuri in the form of Protogirls: Asuka Soryo and Yui Ichijo Parallel love story http://img13.imageshack.us/img13/4468/saishonoevangelionshokige5.jpg http://www.mediafire.com/?y4hmmzlm5z1

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 03, 2009 6:30 pm This is just an informative bump: Apparently that scene of Misato and the others cosplaying as the pilots ISN'T in that AsukaxShinji series, but in some other Pengel book. Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 03, 2009 6:56 pm Forgot about this. Here you go. Afuter of Evangelion Second Anthogy Not sure you told you it wasn't the Shinji & Asuka series, SSD, but dey be mistakin'.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 03, 2009 7:01 pm ....WHY DID PENGEL REMOVE THAT FROM THE GIANT 700 PAGE OMNIBUS? He included all those other shorts and extras! (What I was basing it on.) Thanks for the link.
